name: libhydrasdr1
title: libhydrasdr1
summary: HydraSDR RFOne software defined radio receiver - library
description:
HydraSDR RFOne software defined radio receiver - library
HydraSDR RFOne is an open source Software Defined Radio that can
receive 24-1850 MHz.
It is a High Speed USB device powered by the USB bus.
.
This package contains the shared library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libhydrasdr1 because HydraSDR RFOne software defined radio receiver - library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libhydrasdr1 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libhydrasdr1 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libhydrasdr1 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
